hints.text: US territory (counts as US); 3 unique cars — **St Croix (south)** = a red truck (most coverage) + a white antenna-less car; **St Thomas/St John (north)** = a white car w/ antenna & shorter cab
Distinctive colonial architecture (Renaissance/Baroque/Rococo/Victorian): **large arched facades**, central plazas & courtyards
Former **Danish colony** → some Danish street names (e.g. '**gade**') / bilingual signs in historic downtowns
Plates are short, w/ a **bright-blue or dark-blue** design
**St Croix** (south) = loose grid (roads WSW–ENE); **St John & St Thomas** (north) = much curvier roads; boat trekkers off N St Croix (Buck Island has a pink camera tint)
